description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slim build, standing upright and holding a large, rectangular wooden frame over one shoulder. The person is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, with dark shoes. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, and the facial features are simplified. The wooden frame is oversized compared to the person, with clean, angular lines and a smooth finish. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban context, possibly representing someone transporting or carrying a large object through a city environment.
description: A standing adult figure holding a large rectangular wooden frame over one shoulder, dressed in a sleeveless top and pants with short hair and dark shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, torso, and the wooden frame resting diagonally over the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the person and the full length of the wooden frame extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, body, and the broad surface of the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Right side view with the person's profile and the wooden frame extending forward, partially obscuring the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with one arm raised to support the frame
